{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Stonedeep Mines
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Stonedeep Mines]] are a location where [[Renfei]] returned runaways.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
